stocks.description: Savara Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative therapies for rare respiratory diseases. The company's main products and services include inhalation therapies, such as Molgradex and Apulmiq, which target conditions like pulmonary alveolar proteinosis and nontuberculous mycobacterial (NTM) lung infection. Savara's market focus is on addressing unmet medical needs in the rare respiratory disease space, with a goal of improving patient outcomes and quality of life.

Algoma Steel Group Inc. (ASTL) is a Canadian steel manufacturer that produces a range of steel products, including hot and cold rolled steel, plate, and sheet. The company's main products cater to various industries, including construction, automotive, and manufacturing. With a focus on the North American market, Algoma Steel aims to provide high-quality steel products to meet the demands of its diverse customer base.

Cabaletta Bio Inc is a clinical-stage biotechnology company that develops and commercializes innovative therapies for autoimmune diseases. The company's main products and services focus on targeted immunotherapies, including its proprietary CAART (Chimeric Antigen Receptor T-cell) platform. Cabaletta's market focus is on treating severe and debilitating autoimmune diseases, with an initial emphasis on mucosal pemphigus vulgaris and other orphan diseases.

Sleep Number Corp (SNBR) is a manufacturer and retailer of sleep technology products, primarily focusing on adjustable air mattresses and beds. The company's main products include its Sleep Number 360 smart beds, which offer advanced features such as temperature control, massage, and sleep tracking. Sleep Number Corp operates a direct-to-consumer business model, selling its products through retail stores, online channels, and phone sales, targeting consumers seeking high-end sleep solutions.

Vermilion Energy Inc. is an international oil and gas exploration and production company. The company's main products include light oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids, which it produces from its operations in North America, Europe, and Australia. Vermilion Energy's market focus is on the acquisition, development, and optimization of producing properties, with a emphasis on generating strong returns and growth for its shareholders.

Sana Biotechnology Inc is a biotechnology company focused on engineering cells to repair or replace damaged tissues. The company's main products and services involve the development of cell therapies and gene editing technologies to treat various diseases. Sana's market focus is on creating new treatments for a range of medical conditions, including genetic disorders, cancer, and other diseases.

AMC Entertainment Holdings Inc. is a leading theatrical exhibition company that owns and operates a global chain of movie theaters. The company's main products and services include film exhibition, food and beverage sales, and premium formats such as IMAX and 3D screenings. AMC's market focus is on providing an immersive cinematic experience to moviegoers, with a presence in the United States, Europe, and other international markets.

Compass Diversified Holdings (CODI) is a conglomerate that owns and operates a diverse portfolio of businesses in various industries. The company's subsidiaries provide a range of products and services, including manufacturing, distribution, and consumer goods. CODI's market focus is on acquiring and growing middle-market businesses with strong cash flows and potential for long-term growth.

Corsair Gaming Inc (CRSR) is a leading developer and supplier of high-performance computer hardware and gaming peripherals. The company's main products include gaming keyboards, mice, headsets, and PC components such as memory, storage, and power supplies. Corsair's market focus is on the gaming and esports industries, catering to professional gamers, content creators, and gaming enthusiasts worldwide.

Intest Corp, operating as INTT, is a technology company that designs, manufactures, and markets semiconductor test and handling equipment. The company's main products include semiconductor test handlers, and contactors, which are used by semiconductor manufacturers to test and package integrated circuits. INTT's market focus is on the global semiconductor industry, serving manufacturers of semiconductors and related products.

United States Antimony Corp (UAMY) is a mining and refining company that produces antimony, a rare and strategic metal used in various applications. The company's main products include antimony oxide, antimony metal, and antimony sulfide, which are used in flame retardants, ceramics, and ammunition. UAMY focuses on the extraction and processing of antimony from its mines in the United States and Mexico, serving the global market for industrial metals.

BigBear.ai Holdings Inc (BBAI) is a technology company that provides artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) solutions to its clients. The company's main products and services include data analytics, cyber security, and AI-powered decision support systems, primarily serving the US government and commercial markets. BigBear.ai's solutions aim to help organizations make data-driven decisions and improve operational efficiency.

Eledon Pharmaceuticals Inc is a biotechnology company focused on developing innovative treatments for neurodegenerative diseases and immune disorders. The company's main product is Tegoprubart, a drug candidate being investigated for the treatment of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) and other neurodegenerative diseases. Eledon's market focus is on addressing unmet medical needs in the neurology and immunology spaces.

ASP Isotopes Inc (ASPI) is a leading provider of stable isotopes and related products. The company specializes in the development, production, and distribution of stable isotopes, which are used in various applications such as pharmaceutical research, medical diagnostics, and industrial manufacturing. ASPI's main products include isotopically labeled compounds, which are used to advance research and development in fields like medicine, environmental science, and materials science.

Sunopta, Inc. (STKL) is a global company that specializes in the production and distribution of organic and non-organic food products, including beverages, such as coffee, tea, and plant-based milk alternatives. The company's main products and services focus on healthy and sustainable consumer goods, catering to the growing demand for natural and organic products. Sunopta's market focus is on the consumer defensive sector, providing staple products to retailers and foodservice providers worldwide.

Navitas Semiconductor Corp (NVTS) is a semiconductor company that designs, develops, and markets gallium nitride (GaN) power integrated circuits. Their main products enable faster charging, higher power density, and greater energy efficiency in a wide range of applications, including mobile devices, data centers, and electric vehicles. Navitas focuses on the global power electronics market, targeting industries such as consumer, enterprise, and renewable energy.

Sportsman's Warehouse Holdings Inc (SPWH) is a specialty retailer that operates outdoor specialty stores, offering a wide range of products for hunting, shooting, fishing, and camping. The company's main products and services include firearms, ammunition, fishing gear, and camping equipment, catering to outdoor enthusiasts and sportsmen. SPWH focuses on the mid-to-high-end market, targeting individuals who participate in outdoor activities and require high-quality gear and expertise.

Kosmos Energy Ltd is an independent oil and gas exploration and production company. The company's main products and services include the exploration, development, and production of oil and natural gas, with a focus on deepwater assets in West Africa, the Gulf of Mexico, and other regions. Kosmos Energy's market focus is on creating value through the discovery and development of new oil and gas resources, with an emphasis on sustainable and responsible operations.

FTAI Infrastructure Inc, also known as FIP, is a company that invests in and manages infrastructure assets. Their main focus is on transportation infrastructure, including pipelines, terminals, and other energy-related assets. FIP's portfolio includes a range of critical infrastructure assets that facilitate the transportation and storage of energy products, serving a diverse customer base across North America.

Xerox Holdings Corp is a technology company that provides document management and digital printing solutions. The company's main products and services include multifunction printers, copiers, and software solutions for managing documents and workflows. Xerox primarily serves the enterprise and small-to-medium-sized business markets, focusing on helping organizations streamline their document-related processes and improve productivity.

VAALCO Energy, Inc. (EGY) is an independent energy company that engages in the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of crude oil and natural gas. The company's main products include crude oil and natural gas, with a primary focus on offshore production in West Africa, particularly in Gabon. VAALCO Energy's market focus is on the exploration and production (E&P) sector, targeting high-margin oil and gas reserves.

Tronox Holdings plc, operating as TROX, is a global leader in the production and marketing of titanium dioxide (TiO2) pigment. The company's main products include TiO2, zircon, and other mineral sands, which are used in a variety of applications such as coatings, plastics, and paper. TROX focuses on serving the global chemicals market, with a particular emphasis on the paint, plastics, and paper industries.

Atomera Inc. is a semiconductor materials and technology licensing company that develops and licenses its proprietary Mears Silicon Technology (MST) to semiconductor manufacturers. The company's MST technology aims to improve the performance and efficiency of semiconductors, enabling the creation of smaller, faster, and more powerful chips. Atomera's main focus is on the semiconductor industry, targeting manufacturers of transistors, memory chips, and other semiconductor devices.

Annexon Inc is a biotechnology company focused on developing innovative treatments for autoimmune and neurodegenerative diseases. The company's main products and services include monoclonal antibody therapies, with a primary focus on complement-mediated disorders such as Guillain-Barré Syndrome and Huntington's disease. Annexon's pipeline is centered on harnessing the immune system to create novel therapies for patients with limited treatment options.

Intellicheck Inc, also known as IDN, is a technology company that provides software solutions for identity verification and authentication. The company's main products include Intellicheck Mobilisa, a suite of identity verification and validation tools, and AgeID, an age verification solution. IDN's solutions are primarily used by retailers, financial institutions, and law enforcement agencies to prevent fraud, underage drinking, and other identity-related crimes.

American Vanguard Corp (AVD) is a developer and marketer of specialty and niche crop protection and plant health products. The company's main products include insecticides, herbicides, fungicides, and plant growth regulators, which are used in agricultural and non-agricultural markets. AVD focuses on providing innovative solutions to the global agricultural industry, with a market presence in the US, Latin America, and other international markets.

Dakota Gold Corp is a gold exploration and development company focused on discovering and extracting gold deposits. The company's main products and services include gold exploration, mining, and development, with a primary focus on the Homestake District in South Dakota. Dakota Gold Corp aims to create value for its shareholders by advancing its gold projects and increasing its mineral reserves.

Archer Aviation Inc. is an aerospace company that designs, develops, and manufactures electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft. The company's main product is its Midnight eVTOL aircraft, which is designed for urban air mobility and is expected to provide on-demand air transportation services. Archer's market focus is on the emerging urban air mobility market, with a goal of reducing traffic congestion and emissions in cities.

Rocket Pharmaceuticals Inc is a biotechnology company that develops and commercializes gene therapies for rare and devastating diseases. The company's main products and services focus on treating genetic disorders, such as Leukocyte Adhesion Deficiency (LAD), Fanconi Anemia, and Pyruvate Kinase Deficiency, using lentiviral vector-based gene therapy platforms. Its market focus is on rare pediatric diseases with significant unmet medical needs.

Accuray Inc. is a medical device company that designs, develops, and sells radiosurgery and radiation therapy systems for the treatment of cancer and other diseases. The company's main products include the CyberKnife and TomoTherapy systems, which deliver precise and non-invasive radiation treatments. Accuray's market focus is on providing innovative oncology solutions to healthcare providers worldwide, enhancing patient care and outcomes.

Amplify Energy Corp, operating as AMPY, is an independent oil and natural gas company engaged in the acquisition, development, and production of oil and natural gas properties. The company's main products include crude oil and natural gas, which are produced from its properties located in the United States. AMPY's market focus is on the exploration and production (E&P) of oil and gas, with a primary emphasis on maximizing returns from its existing assets.

Vox Royalty Corp is a precious metals royalty and streaming company that focuses on acquiring and managing a portfolio of royalties and streams on mining assets. The company's main products and services include generating revenue from royalty payments on gold, silver, and other precious metal production from its portfolio of mining assets. Vox Royalty's market focus is on providing investors with exposure to a diversified portfolio of mining royalties and streams, offering a unique investment opportunity in the precious metals sector.

Aurora Innovation Inc. is a technology company that develops and deploys autonomous vehicle software. The company's main product is its Aurora Driver platform, which provides a suite of software and hardware solutions for autonomous vehicles. Aurora's market focus is on the development of self-driving cars and trucks, with a goal of making transportation safer, more efficient, and accessible.

Enovix Corporation (ENVX) designs, develops, and manufactures 3D stacked lithium-ion batteries for electric vehicles, mobile devices, and other applications. The company's main product is a high-energy density battery that aims to improve performance, safety, and charging speed. Enovix focuses on the electric vehicle and consumer electronics markets, targeting customers seeking high-performance and reliable battery solutions.

Aura Biosciences Inc is a biotechnology company that develops and commercializes novel targeted therapies for the treatment of cancer. The company's main product is AU-011, a virus-like drug conjugate for the treatment of primary choroidal melanoma and other ocular cancers. Aura Biosciences focuses on the oncology market, specifically on developing innovative treatments for rare and debilitating eye cancers.

Macrogenics Inc (MGNX) is a biotechnology company that develops and commercializes innovative immunotherapies to treat various types of cancer and autoimmune disorders. The company's main products and services focus on monoclonal antibody-based treatments, including its proprietary DART and Fc Optimization technologies. Macrogenics' market focus is on oncology and autoimmune diseases, with a pipeline of clinical-stage programs targeting significant unmet medical needs.

Atlas Energy Solutions Inc (AESI) is a company that provides a range of oil and gas equipment and services to the energy industry. Their main products and services include electric submersible pumps, well construction, and other production-related equipment and services. The company primarily focuses on the US land market, supporting the drilling and production activities of oil and gas operators.

Nkarta Inc is a biotechnology company that develops and commercializes allogeneic cell therapies for the treatment of cancer and other diseases. The company's main product candidates are natural killer (NK) cell therapies, which are designed to target and destroy cancer cells. Nkarta's focus is on developing off-the-shelf, readily available cell therapies that can be used to treat a range of hematologic and solid tumors.

Korro Bio Inc is a biotechnology company that develops RNA-based therapies for various diseases. The company's main products and services focus on utilizing its proprietary RNA editing platform, called OPTIC, to discover and develop novel treatments. Korro Bio's market focus is on creating innovative therapies for genetic diseases and other unmet medical needs.

Ur-Energy Inc. is a uranium mining company that engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of uranium properties. The company's main products and services include the production and sale of uranium concentrates, with a focus on in-situ recovery (ISR) mining methods. Ur-Energy's market focus is on the global nuclear energy industry, supplying uranium to nuclear power plants and utilities.

Bed Bath & Beyond Inc. is a retail company that operates a chain of stores selling a wide range of home goods, including bedding, kitchenware, and household items. The company's main products and services include home furnishings, domestics, and household items, which are sold through its physical stores and online platform. Bed Bath & Beyond focuses on the mid-range market, catering to a broad customer base seeking affordable home goods and decor.

Kopin Corp is a leading developer and manufacturer of innovative wearable technologies and display components. The company's main products include microdisplays, optical modules, and display subassemblies used in a range of applications, including consumer and industrial wearables, military and enterprise head-mounted displays, and virtual reality (VR) and augmented reality (AR) systems. Kopin's market focus is on providing high-resolution, low-power display solutions for various industries, including consumer electronics, military, and industrial markets.

PureCycle Technologies Inc. is a recycling company that develops and licenses technology to transform polypropylene waste into ultra-pure, virgin-like plastic. The company's main product is a patented purification process that removes contaminants and colors from polypropylene, producing a high-quality resin that can be used in various applications. PureCycle's technology aims to reduce plastic waste and promote sustainability in the plastics industry.

Hain Celestial Group Inc is a leading natural and organic products company that offers a wide range of food and personal care products. The company's main products include organic and natural foods, beverages, and personal care items, such as Earth's Best baby food and Terra Chips. Hain Celestial focuses on the health-conscious consumer market, catering to individuals seeking natural and organic alternatives to traditional packaged foods.

QVC Group Inc is a leading e-commerce and video commerce company that offers a wide range of products, including electronics, jewelry, apparel, and home goods, through its QVC and HSN brands. The company's main products and services include live broadcast shopping, online shopping, and mobile commerce, catering to a diverse customer base. QVC Group Inc focuses on the global consumer market, with a strong presence in the US, UK, Germany, Japan, and Italy.

SEACOR Marine Holdings Inc (SMHI) provides marine transportation services to the offshore oil and gas industry. The company's main products and services include offshore support vessels, such as platform supply vessels and fast support vessels, which transport personnel, cargo, and equipment to and from offshore platforms. SMHI operates globally, with a focus on the Gulf of Mexico, Latin America, and international markets.

Outset Medical Inc is a medical device company that develops and commercializes innovative dialysis technology. The company's main product, Tablo, is a dialysis system designed for use in various settings, including clinics, hospitals, and homes. Outset Medical focuses on improving the experience and outcomes of patients with end-stage renal disease (ESRD) by providing a more user-friendly, efficient, and cost-effective dialysis solution.

Shoals Technologies Group Inc (SHLS) is a solar energy company that designs and manufactures electrical balance of system (EBOS) solutions for solar panels. The company's main products include combiners, recombiners, and cable assemblies that help optimize solar panel performance and efficiency. Shoals Technologies focuses on the renewable energy market, serving solar panel manufacturers, engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) companies, and project developers worldwide.

Full House Resorts, Inc. is a casino and resort operator that owns and manages several properties in the United States. The company's main products and services include casino gaming, hospitality, and entertainment, with a focus on regional markets. Its portfolio includes casinos and resorts in Indiana, Mississippi, and Nevada, catering to a diverse range of customers seeking gaming, dining, and lodging experiences.

The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company is a leading manufacturer of tires and other rubber products. The company's main products include a wide range of tires for various vehicles, such as passenger cars, trucks, buses, and aircraft, as well as related products and services like tire retreading and automotive repair. Goodyear's market focus is on the global automotive industry, serving both original equipment manufacturers and replacement tire markets.

Absci Corp is a biotechnology company that utilizes artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning to design and develop new biological products and therapies. The company's main product is its Integrated Drug Creation platform, which aims to accelerate the discovery and development of new medicines. Absci's market focus is on partnering with pharmaceutical and biotech companies to apply its technology and improve the efficiency of drug development.

Bit Digital Inc (BTBT) is a cryptocurrency mining company that focuses on mining Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. The company's main products and services include cryptocurrency mining operations, with a primary focus on Bitcoin mining, and it also provides hosting services for other miners. Bit Digital's market focus is on the global cryptocurrency market, with operations primarily in the United States and Canada.

ZoomInfo Technologies Inc, also known as ZoomInfo, is a go-to-market (GTM) intelligence platform that provides businesses with access to a database of company and contact information. The company's main products and services include its platform, which offers sales and marketing teams actionable insights to identify, connect, and engage with target customers. ZoomInfo's market focus is on helping businesses streamline their sales and marketing efforts through data-driven decision making.

Transocean Ltd (RIG) is a leading offshore drilling contractor that provides drilling services to oil and gas companies worldwide. The company's main products and services include ultra-deepwater and harsh environment drilling, as well as midwater and shallow water drilling. Transocean's market focus is on serving major oil and gas companies, including national oil companies and independent operators, with a global presence in regions such as the Gulf of Mexico, North Sea, and Southeast Asia.

EVgo Inc is a leading public electric vehicle (EV) charging network in the US. The company provides fast and convenient charging solutions to EV drivers, offering a range of charging plans and services. EVgo's main products and services include public EV charging stations, charging plans, and software solutions, focusing on the growing electric vehicle market.

NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust (NXDT) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in a diversified portfolio of real estate assets, including commercial properties, residential properties, and real estate-related securities. The company's main focus is on generating income and long-term capital appreciation for its shareholders through strategic investments in various real estate sectors. NXDT aims to provide a stable source of income and diversification benefits to its investors.

TSS Inc, operating as TSSI, is a technology company that provides information technology services and solutions. The company's main products and services include data center and IT infrastructure management, cloud services, and cybersecurity solutions. TSSI primarily focuses on serving the US federal government, as well as commercial and enterprise clients, with a strong emphasis on secure and reliable IT operations.

Health Catalyst Inc (HCAT) is a healthcare technology company that provides data and analytics solutions to healthcare organizations. The company's main products and services include a data platform, analytics software, and professional services that help clients improve patient outcomes and reduce costs. Health Catalyst's market focus is on the US healthcare industry, serving a wide range of clients including hospitals, health systems, and medical groups.

Gevo Inc is a specialty chemicals company that develops and produces renewable, low-carbon fuels and chemicals. The company's main products include isobutanol, a bio-based alternative to petroleum-based fuels and chemicals, as well as jet fuel and other hydrocarbons. Gevo's market focus is on the renewable energy and chemicals sectors, targeting customers in the aviation, automotive, and chemical industries.

Cadiz Inc. (CDZI) is a water supply and storage company that develops and implements water supply projects in California. The company's main product is water, which it supplies to municipal, industrial, and agricultural customers through its water storage and conveyance systems. Cadiz focuses on providing a reliable and sustainable water supply to meet the growing demands of Southern California's communities and industries.

iHeartMedia Inc, operating as IHRT, is a leading media and entertainment company that specializes in radio broadcasting, digital audio, and outdoor advertising. The company's main products and services include radio stations, podcasts, and digital streaming services, such as iHeartRadio, which offers live and on-demand content to millions of listeners. iHeartMedia's market focus is on providing entertainment, news, and advertising solutions to a wide range of audiences across the United States.

Hertz Global Holdings Inc. is a leading rental car company that provides vehicle rental services to customers worldwide. The company's main products and services include car rentals, equipment rentals, and fleet management services, operating under the Hertz, Dollar, and Thrifty brands. Hertz focuses on serving the travel and transportation needs of leisure and business customers, with a presence in approximately 10,200 corporate and franchisee locations in over 160 countries.

Genasys Inc, formerly known as LRAD Corporation, is a technology company that designs, develops, and manufactures innovative critical communication and safety solutions. The company's main products include its Long Range Acoustic Devices (LRAD) and Genasys critical communication platforms, which are used for public safety, emergency alert systems, and mass notification. Genasys' solutions are focused on helping organizations and governments communicate effectively during emergencies and critical situations.

Patterson-UTI Energy Inc (PTEN) is a leading provider of onshore drilling and pressure pumping services in the United States. The company's main products and services include contract drilling, pressure pumping, and directional drilling, which support the exploration and production of oil and natural gas. PTEN's market focus is on the North American oil and gas industry, serving a diverse range of customers, including major oil and gas companies and independent operators.

Funko Inc. is a leading pop culture consumer products company that designs, sources, and distributes highly stylized vinyl figures, plush toys, and other collectibles. The company's main products include its iconic Pop! figures, as well as other lines such as Dorbz, Mystery Minis, and Keychains. Funko's products are focused on popular culture, including movies, TV shows, video games, music, and sports, and are sold through various channels, including online marketplaces, retail stores, and its own e-commerce platform.

Intuitive Machines Inc, operating under the brand LUNR, is a space technology company that develops and manufactures lunar landing systems. Their main products and services include spacecraft, lunar landers, and related mission operations, focusing on delivering payloads to the lunar surface. LUNR's market focus is on supporting NASA's Artemis program and other commercial space initiatives, enabling a sustainable human presence on the Moon.

Newell Brands Inc (NWL) is a consumer goods company that designs, manufactures, and markets a wide range of household and personal care products. Its main products and services include kitchen appliances, cookware, writing instruments, and baby and parenting products under brands such as Sharpie, Elmer's, and Rubbermaid. The company focuses on the global consumer market, providing everyday essentials to households and businesses.

Evolv Technologies Holdings Inc (EVLV) is a security screening company that specializes in developing and manufacturing advanced threat detection systems. The company's main products include artificial intelligence (AI)-powered security screening systems, such as Evolv Express, which use sensors and machine learning algorithms to detect and prevent threats. Evolv's solutions are primarily used in public venues, such as stadiums, arenas, and transportation hubs, to enhance security and improve the visitor experience.

Outdoor Holding Co, operating as POWW, is a holding company that owns and operates businesses in the outdoor and aerospace industries. The company's main products and services include outdoor gear, equipment, and technology, as well as aerospace and defense solutions. Its market focus is on providing innovative products and services to outdoor enthusiasts, the US military, and government agencies.

B&G Foods, Inc. is a leading manufacturer and distributor of branded packaged foods in the United States. The company's product portfolio includes a wide range of shelf-stable foods, such as vegetables, fruits, meats, and condiments, under brands like Green Giant, Cream of Wheat, and Ortega. B&G Foods focuses on the consumer defensive market, providing staple food products to grocery stores, supermarkets, and other retail outlets.

Udemy Inc is an online learning platform that offers a wide range of courses and training programs in various fields, including technology, business, and creative skills. The company's main product is its marketplace, where instructors can create and sell courses to students worldwide. Udemy's market focus is on providing affordable and accessible education to individuals and organizations, with a global reach and a diverse course catalog.

Backblaze Inc (BLZE) is a cloud-based data storage company that provides online backup and cloud storage services for individuals and businesses. The company's main products include B2 Cloud Storage, a scalable and cost-effective object storage solution, and Backblaze Backup, a personal backup service. Backblaze focuses on the global cloud storage market, targeting customers seeking reliable, secure, and affordable data storage solutions.

Digital Turbine Inc, operating as APPS, is a mobile software company that provides media and mobile advertising solutions. The company's main products and services include mobile app delivery and discovery, as well as advertising and content monetization platforms. Digital Turbine's market focus is on mobile operators, device manufacturers, and app developers, helping them to deliver and monetize mobile content.

Berry Corp is an independent oil and natural gas company that engages in the acquisition, development, and production of oil and natural gas properties. The company's main products include crude oil and natural gas, which are sold to refiners, marketers, and other energy companies. Berry Corp's market focus is on the Western United States, with primary operations in California, Utah, and Colorado.

The Beauty Health Company, also known as SKIN, is a global category-creating company focused on delivering innovative products and solutions in the beauty and wellness industry. Its main product, Hydrafacial, is a non-invasive skincare treatment that provides long-lasting hydration and improves skin health. The company's market focus is on the professional skincare industry, partnering with spas, wellness centers, and medical offices to offer its products and services.

KORU Medical Systems Inc (KRMD) is a medical technology company that develops and commercializes innovative infusion and injection technologies. The company's main product is the FREEDOM Syringe Driver, a portable infusion system designed for subcutaneous drug delivery. KORU Medical Systems focuses on the home infusion and specialty pharmacy markets, providing solutions for patients with chronic conditions requiring self-administered medications.

AMC Networks Inc. is a media company that owns and operates a portfolio of entertainment brands, including AMC, BBC America, IFC, SundanceTV, and WE tv. The company produces and distributes content across various platforms, offering a range of popular TV shows, movies, and documentaries to a global audience. Its main focus is on creating and delivering high-quality, engaging content to viewers through traditional linear TV, digital platforms, and streaming services.

Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings Inc (CCO) is a leading outdoor advertising company that provides a range of advertising services through various media platforms. The company's main products and services include billboards, digital displays, and other out-of-home advertising solutions, helping businesses reach their target audiences. CCO's market focus is on providing effective advertising solutions to clients across the globe, with a presence in over 30 countries worldwide.

Methode Electronics, Inc. (MEI) is a leading global developer of custom engineered and application-specific products and solutions. The company's main products and services include electrical and electronic components, such as switches, sensors, and interfaces, used in various industries including automotive, industrial, and medical. MEI's market focus is on providing innovative solutions to help customers improve performance, reliability, and efficiency in their products and systems.

Indie Semiconductor Inc. is a technology company that designs, develops, and supplies semiconductor and software solutions for the automotive, industrial, medical, and other markets. The company's main products include system-on-chip (SoC) solutions, mixed-signal ICs, and software for applications such as advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS) and electrification. Indie Semiconductor focuses on providing high-performance, low-power semiconductor solutions to enable next-generation automotive and industrial systems.

DigitalBridge Group Inc (DBRG) is a leading global digital infrastructure investment firm. The company invests in and manages a portfolio of digital infrastructure assets, including cell towers, data centers, and fiber networks, providing essential connectivity and technology infrastructure to businesses and communities. DBRG's main focus is on generating long-term returns for its investors by identifying and capitalizing on opportunities in the rapidly evolving digital infrastructure sector.

Expensify Inc (EXFY) is a financial technology company that provides a cloud-based expense management platform. The company's main product is an eponymous expense reporting and tracking tool that helps individuals and businesses manage expenses, receipts, and invoices. Expensify's platform is designed to simplify financial management for small to medium-sized businesses, as well as larger enterprises, with a focus on ease of use and automation.

DMC Global Inc, formerly known as Dynamic Materials Corporation, is a diversified company that operates through its DynaEnergetics and NobelClad business segments. The company's main products and services include explosive products and metalworking services, with a focus on the oil and gas, and industrial markets. Its solutions cater to the needs of energy, infrastructure, and industrial companies worldwide.

3D Systems Corp, also known as DDD, is a leading provider of 3D printing solutions, including printers, materials, and software. The company's main products and services focus on additive manufacturing, enabling customers to create complex geometric structures and functional products. Its market focus spans various industries, including healthcare, aerospace, automotive, and consumer goods, providing innovative solutions for prototyping, production, and digital dentistry.

Crescent Energy Co (CRGY) is an independent oil and natural gas company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and production of oil and gas properties. The company's main products include crude oil and natural gas, which it produces from its operated assets in the United States. Crescent Energy's market focus is on delivering long-term value to its stakeholders through disciplined capital allocation and operational efficiency in the oil and gas sector.

Oil States International, Inc. (OIS) is a leading provider of oilfield services and equipment to the oil and gas industry. The company's main products and services include well site services, downhole drilling and completion services, and oil country tubular goods. OIS operates globally, with a focus on the US, Latin America, and international markets, serving major and independent oil and gas companies.

Aspen Aerogels Inc (ASPN) is a leading manufacturer of aerogel insulation materials. The company's main products include PyroThin, PyroPore, and Spaceloft, which are used to reduce heat transfer and energy consumption in various industrial and building applications. Aspen Aerogels' market focus is on the energy, aerospace, and building materials sectors, providing high-performance insulation solutions to customers worldwide.

Ginkgo Bioworks Holdings Inc is a biotechnology company that designs, engineers, and develops microbial cells for various applications. The company's main products and services include its foundry platform, which enables the rapid development of new biological products, such as biofuels, nutrition ingredients, and pharmaceuticals. Ginkgo's market focus is on leveraging synthetic biology to improve human health, nutrition, and the environment.

enCore Energy Corp is a uranium exploration and development company focused on becoming a leading supplier of uranium to the global energy market. The company's main products and services include the exploration, development, and production of uranium, with a primary focus on in-situ recovery (ISR) and conventional mining methods. enCore Energy's market focus is on the United States, with a portfolio of projects in Texas, New Mexico, and Wyoming.

SPRY is an intranasal epinephrine product designed for the emergency treatment of severe allergic reactions, including anaphylaxis. The company's main product, SPRY, aims to provide a convenient and easy-to-use alternative to traditional epinephrine auto-injectors.

Sunstone Hotel Investors Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates a portfolio of upscale and upper-upscale hotels in the United States. The company's main focus is on acquiring, owning, and operating hotels, with a portfolio that includes brands such as Marriott, Hilton, and Hyatt. Sunstone Hotel Investors aims to provide long-term value to its shareholders through a combination of income and capital appreciation from its hotel investments.

Janus International Group Inc. is a leading global provider of self-storage and commercial products, offering a range of solutions including rolling steel doors, hallway systems, and relocation services. The company's main products and services cater to the self-storage, commercial, and industrial markets, focusing on innovative and secure storage solutions. Janus International operates globally, serving customers across North America, Europe, and Asia.

Piedmont Realty Trust Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates high-quality office properties in select markets across the United States. The company's main focus is on acquiring, developing, and managing Class A office buildings, with a portfolio of properties located in major metropolitan areas. Piedmont's primary service is providing office space to a diverse range of tenants, including corporate and government entities.

Smith & Wesson Brands Inc (SWBI) is a leading manufacturer of firearms and accessories. The company's main products include handguns, rifles, and shotguns, as well as shooting and hunting accessories, catering to a wide range of customers including law enforcement, military, and civilian markets. Smith & Wesson's market focus is on the US firearms industry, with a strong brand presence and a long history of producing high-quality firearms.

Genworth Financial Inc (GNW) is a financial services company that provides insurance and financial products to individuals and businesses. The company's main products and services include life insurance, long-term care insurance, and mortgage insurance, with a focus on helping people secure their financial futures. Genworth operates in the United States and internationally, serving a broad market of consumers, lenders, and other financial institutions.

Stoneridge Inc. is a global designer and manufacturer of highly engineered electrical and electronic systems, components, and modules for the automotive, commercial vehicle, and off-highway markets. The company's main products include electrical distribution systems, electronics, and safety-critical components. Stoneridge's solutions focus on improving vehicle safety, efficiency, and emissions, with a market presence in over 25 countries worldwide.

Sight Sciences Inc. is a medical device company that develops and commercializes innovative technologies for the treatment of glaucoma and other eye diseases. The company's main products include the OMNI Surgical System and the TearCare System, which are designed to provide minimally invasive and micro-invasive solutions for eye care. Sight Sciences focuses on the ophthalmology market, aiming to improve patient outcomes and reduce the burden of eye diseases.

JELD-WEN Holding Inc is a global manufacturer of building products, specializing in doors, windows, and related hardware and accessories. The company's main products include interior and exterior doors, wood, vinyl, and aluminum windows, and other building components. JELD-WEN's market focus is on the residential and commercial construction industries, serving customers worldwide through a network of manufacturing facilities, distribution centers, and sales offices.

PaySign Inc, operating as PAYS, is a provider of prepaid card programs and processing services. The company offers a range of payment solutions, including prepaid debit cards, mobile payments, and payroll card services, primarily targeting businesses and government agencies. Its main products and services focus on facilitating electronic payments and providing financial transaction management solutions.

Northern Technologies International Corp (NTIC) develops and markets specialty chemicals and materials for various industries. The company's main products include corrosion inhibitors, lubricants, and nanotechnology-based solutions, which are used in applications such as oil and gas, water treatment, and industrial processes. NTIC's market focus is on providing innovative, environmentally friendly solutions to customers worldwide, with a strong presence in North America, Europe, and Asia.

Designer Brands Inc. (DBI) is a retailer of footwear and accessories, operating a portfolio of brands including DSW, The Shoe Company, and others. The company offers a wide range of products, including shoes, boots, and accessories for men, women, and children, through its retail stores and e-commerce platforms. DBI's main focus is on providing affordable, fashionable footwear and accessories to a broad market, with a strong presence in North America.

Rimini Street Inc. is a global provider of enterprise software products and services, specializing in third-party support for Oracle and SAP software products. The company's main products and services include premium support, application management, and security services for clients using enterprise software. Rimini Street's market focus is on providing cost-effective and personalized support alternatives to traditional vendor-provided support, targeting medium to large-sized organizations.

Standard BioTools Inc, operating as LAB, is a life sciences company that provides single-cell analysis and sorting solutions. The company's main products include microfluidic systems, such as the Nadia platform, which enable researchers to analyze and sort individual cells. LAB's solutions cater to the biopharmaceutical, academic, and government research markets, focusing on cell therapy, immunology, and cancer research applications.

Organon & Co is a healthcare company that develops and delivers innovative healthcare solutions, with a focus on women's health, biosimilars, and established brands. The company's main products and services include reproductive health treatments, biosimilar therapies, and a range of established pharmaceutical brands. Organon & Co operates globally, serving patients and healthcare providers in over 140 markets worldwide.

UNIFI, Inc. (UFI) is a textile manufacturing company that produces and processes synthetic and natural fibers. The company's main products include polyester, nylon, and other specialty fibers used in a variety of applications, such as apparel, automotive, and industrial textiles. UFI's market focus is on providing high-quality fibers to global textile manufacturers, with a strong presence in the United States, Asia, and other international markets.

Coherus Biosciences, Inc., operating as Coherus Oncology, Inc. since a name change in 2022, is a biotechnology company focused on developing innovative treatments for cancer. The company's main products and services include biosimilar drug candidates and immuno-oncology therapies. Coherus Oncology's market focus is on oncology, with a goal of providing affordable and effective cancer treatments to patients worldwide.

Franklin Street Properties Corp is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates a portfolio of office properties in the United States. The company's main focus is on acquiring, renovating, and repositioning office buildings in select markets to generate rental income and long-term value. Its portfolio consists of high-quality office properties, primarily located in urban and suburban areas with strong demand for office space.

TELA Bio Inc is a medical device company that develops and markets innovative tissue reinforcement materials for soft tissue repair. The company's main products include its OviTex and OviTex Reinforced BioScaffold (RBS) lines, which are used in hernia repair and other abdominal wall reconstruction procedures. TELA Bio's market focus is on providing advanced, biologically-inspired solutions for surgeons and patients in the hernia repair and abdominal wall reconstruction markets.

Fossil Group Inc is a global design, marketing, and distribution company that specializes in consumer fashion accessories. The company's main products include watches, jewelry, handbags, and leather accessories, with a portfolio of owned and licensed brands such as Fossil, Skagen, and Armani Exchange. Fossil Group focuses on the fashion-conscious consumer market, offering stylish and affordable accessories to a wide range of customers worldwide.

Redwood Trust Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that operates in the mortgage industry, focusing on investing in and managing a portfolio of mortgage-backed securities. The company's main products and services include originating and acquiring residential and commercial mortgages, as well as issuing and managing mortgage-backed securities. Redwood Trust's market focus is on the US residential and commercial mortgage markets, providing financing solutions to borrowers and investors.

Synchronoss Technologies Inc (SNCR) is a software company that provides cloud-based platforms and services for mobile operators, cable operators, and other companies. Their main products and services include personal cloud, identity access management, and enterprise mobility management solutions. The company's market focus is on enabling service providers to deliver connected experiences and manage digital lifestyles for their customers.

GEE Group Inc, operating under the brand names of SNI Companies, Staffing Now, and others, provides professional staffing services and solutions. The company's main products and services include temporary and permanent staffing, recruitment process outsourcing, and other human resource management services. GEE Group's market focus is on providing staffing solutions to a wide range of industries, including technology, healthcare, finance, and manufacturing.

Everspin Technologies Inc is a leading developer and manufacturer of Magnetoresistive Random Access Memory (MRAM) technologies. The company's main products include MRAM and spin-transfer torque MRAM (STT-MRAM) solutions, which provide high-performance, low-latency, and persistent memory for a range of applications. Everspin's MRAM products are focused on the industrial, automotive, and enterprise storage markets, where they offer advantages in terms of speed, reliability, and power efficiency.

Hello Group Inc, also known as MOMO, is a Chinese technology company that operates a social networking platform, allowing users to connect with others nearby. The company's main products and services include its MOMO and Tantan mobile apps, which offer social networking, live streaming, and online dating features. MOMO's primary market focus is on the Chinese market, catering to the country's large and growing mobile internet user base.

Culp Inc. is a textile manufacturing company that produces and markets a variety of fabrics for residential and commercial applications. The company's main products include upholstery fabrics, finished fabrics, and sewn covers for the furniture, automotive, and recreational vehicle industries. Culp's market focus is on providing high-quality, fashion-forward fabrics to its customers in the United States and internationally.

Biocryst Pharmaceuticals Inc (BCRX) is a biotechnology company that designs, optimizes, and develops small molecule drugs to treat rare and infectious diseases. The company's main products and services focus on the development of oral, antiviral therapies for diseases such as influenza, coronavirus, and hereditary angioedema. Its market focus is on providing innovative treatments for patients with limited or no treatment options, primarily in the specialty pharmaceutical sector.

Day One Biopharmaceuticals Inc, trading as DAWN, is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing targeted therapies for patients with genetically defined cancers. The company's main products and services include the development of small molecule inhibitors designed to target specific genetic mutations. DAWN's market focus is on oncology, with a particular emphasis on pediatric and young adult cancers.

Teladoc Health Inc. is a leading provider of virtual healthcare services, offering telemedicine platforms and software that enable remote medical consultations and patient engagement. The company's main products and services include virtual consultations, chronic care management, and mental health support, catering to a wide range of healthcare needs. Teladoc Health primarily focuses on the healthcare industry, serving patients, employers, health plans, and healthcare providers in the United States and internationally.

Commercial Vehicle Group Inc (CVGI) is a leading supplier of interior and other products for the global commercial vehicle industry. The company's main products include seats, trim, and other interior components, as well as mirrors, wipers, and other exterior accessories. CVGI's market focus is on the heavy-duty truck, construction, and agriculture industries, serving original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) and aftermarket customers worldwide.

Harvard Bioscience Inc (HBIO) is a global developer and manufacturer of life science research and clinical products. The company's main products and services include laboratory equipment, apparatus, and consumables for research and clinical applications, such as syringe pumps, ventilators, and electrophysiology equipment. HBIO's market focus is on the life science research, pharmaceutical, and clinical markets, serving customers in over 100 countries worldwide.

Niagen Bioscience Inc, also known as NAGE, is a biotechnology company that develops and commercializes nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide (NAD+) boosting compounds. The company's main product, Nicotinamide Riboside (NR), is a patented ingredient used in various health and wellness applications, including dietary supplements and pharmaceuticals. NAGE focuses on the healthcare market, targeting the aging and longevity sectors with its NAD+-boosting technology.

FutureFuel Corp is a specialty chemicals company that manufactures and sells various chemical products, including biodiesel, specialty chemicals, and performance chemicals. The company's main products include bio-based chemicals, such as biodiesel and bio-based lubricants, as well as custom-manufactured chemicals for various industries. FutureFuel's market focus is on the renewable energy, agricultural, and industrial sectors, providing sustainable and environmentally friendly chemical solutions.

Gaia Inc is a subscription-based online streaming service that offers a wide range of yoga, meditation, and wellness content, as well as documentaries and original programs focused on personal growth and spirituality. Gaia's market focus is on individuals seeking holistic wellness, self-improvement, and spiritual growth, catering to a niche audience interested in alternative lifestyles and personal development.

Caribou Biosciences Inc (CRBU) is a biotechnology company that develops and commercializes genome-editing technologies. Caribou Biosciences focuses on developing innovative therapies and tools for human health, with a market focus on the biotechnology and pharmaceutical industries.

Destination XL Group Inc (DXLG) is a specialty retailer of men's big and tall apparel. Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises Inc (BW) is a global leader in energy and environmental technologies and services. The company designs, manufactures, and services industrial and power generation equipment, including boilers, air pollution control systems, and waste-to-energy systems. BW's main products and services focus on the power generation, industrial, and environmental markets, providing solutions for efficient and sustainable energy production.

eXp World Holdings Inc (EXPI) is a real estate services company that provides residential and commercial brokerage services through its cloud-based platform. enVVeno Medical Corporation (NVNO) is a medical device company that develops and commercializes innovative solutions for the treatment of venous disease. The company's main product is the VenoValve, a minimally invasive device designed to treat chronic venous insufficiency. enVVeno Medical focuses on the healthcare market, specifically targeting patients suffering from venous reflux disease.

Nextdoor Holdings Inc (NXDR) is a social networking platform that connects neighbors and communities, allowing users to share information, ask for help, and stay informed about local events. The company's main product is its eponymous app, which provides a platform for users to engage with their local communities and access various services such as classifieds, events, and recommendations. Nextdoor's market focus is on building a network of trusted, hyperlocal online communities, primarily targeting residential areas and local businesses.

Sable Offshore Corp (SOC) is an oil and gas company that provides offshore drilling and production services. The company's main products and services include drilling, completion, and production operations for oil and gas wells, primarily focusing on the offshore energy market. SOC operates in the energy sector, catering to the needs of oil and gas companies with its specialized offshore drilling capabilities.

Irobot Corp (IRBT) designs, builds, and sells robots that make a difference in people's lives. The company's main products include the Roomba vacuum cleaning robots and the Braava mopping robots, which cater to the home cleaning market. Irobot's focus is on innovating and delivering practical, easy-to-use robots that simplify household chores for consumers worldwide.

ClearPoint Neuro Inc (CLPT) is a medical device company that develops and commercializes innovative platforms for performing minimally invasive surgical procedures in the brain. The company's main products include the ClearPoint Neuro Navigation System, which enables real-time visualization and guidance for neurosurgeons. ClearPoint's primary market focus is on neurosurgery, with applications in treating conditions such as brain cancer, neurovascular disorders, and movement disorders.

SI-BONE Inc. is a medical device company that develops and commercializes minimally invasive surgical solutions for the treatment of musculoskeletal disorders. The company's main product is the iFuse Implant System, a triangular-shaped titanium implant used to treat sacroiliac joint dysfunction. SI-BONE's primary market focus is on providing innovative solutions for orthopedic and neurosurgical specialists to improve patient outcomes.

Cars.com is an online automotive marketplace that connects buyers and sellers of new and used vehicles. The company provides a platform for consumers to research, compare, and purchase vehicles, as well as offers digital marketing solutions for automotive dealers and manufacturers. Its main products and services include online listings, pricing guides, and advertising tools, with a market focus on the US automotive industry.

Anywhere Real Estate Inc, formerly known as Realogy Holdings Corp, is a leading provider of residential real estate services. The company's main products include footwear, apparel, and accessories under various brands such as Merrell, Sperry, and Keds. Wolverine World Wide focuses on the global footwear and apparel market, catering to outdoor, athletic, and lifestyle consumers.

Compass Inc. is a real estate technology company that provides an integrated platform for real estate agents and homebuyers to search, buy, and sell properties. The company's main products and services include its proprietary software, marketing tools, and agent support services, which aim to streamline the home buying and selling process. Compass primarily focuses on the residential real estate market in the United States, operating in major cities across the country.

Ooma Inc. is a technology company that provides cloud-based communication and security solutions. The company's main products and services include voice over internet protocol (VoIP) phone systems, smart security cameras, and internet security services, catering to both residential and business customers. Ooma's market focus is on delivering affordable, innovative, and user-friendly communication and security solutions to homes, small businesses, and enterprises.

Ocugen Inc is a biotechnology company that focuses on developing and commercializing innovative therapies to treat rare and underserved eye diseases. Ocugen's market focus is on ophthalmology, with a specific emphasis on developing treatments for rare and orphan diseases affecting the eye.

Host Hotels & Resorts Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates a diverse portfolio of luxury and upper-upscale hotels across the United States and internationally.
